## Problem

What learning workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the simplest version of the feature.

## Alternatives

What workaround do you use today?

## Scope

- Does this reduce distraction?
- Does this improve review, note-taking, or categorization?
- Should it be optional?
